fields.name: duration
fields.description: the intermediate stop duration in [ISO8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) PnYnMnDTnHnMnS format, e.g. PT2H10M

fields.name: locationCode
fields.description: the intermediate stop airport IATA code, e.g. CDG. Location could be defined either using location code or address (address line, zip code, country code, city, geo code)

fields.name: addressLine
fields.description: the intermediate stop street address including building number, e.g. 5 Avenue Anatole France

fields.name: countryCode
fields.description: the intermediate stop country, the location with [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1_alpha-2) format (e.g. US)

fields.name: cityName
fields.description: the intermediate stop city name, e.g. Paris

fields.name: zipCode
fields.description: the intermediate stop postal/zip code, e.g. 75007

fields.name: googlePlaceId
fields.description: the intermediate stop google place id only for google address e.g. ChIJL-DOWeBv5kcRfTbh97PimNc.

fields.name: name
fields.description: the intermediate stop name e.g. Airport Name, Hotel Name etc.

fields.name: lfiCode
fields.description: the intermediate stop internal airport identifier used for private jets and helicopters e.g. IT87100

fields.name: stateCode
fields.description: the intermediate stop state code according to [ISO 3166-2](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-2)

fields.name: geoCode
fields.description: the intermediate stop latitude and longitude of geographical location following the structure {latitude},{longitude} e.g. 48.858093,2.294694

fields.name: sequenceNumber
fields.description: sequence number of the stop e.g. 3

fields.name: uicCode
fields.description: UIC code defined by the worldwide railway organization e.g. 8600626
